critical_issues: REGISTER broken (500): ORM model uses column 'name' but public.users table has 'display_name' NOT NULL with no default — INSERT fails with NotNullViolation
CREATE PROJECT broken (500): ORM model uses 'owner_id' FK but public.projects table has 'user_id' — INSERT fails with UndefinedColumn
CREATE TASK broken (500): ORM model includes 'description' and 'assignee_id' columns but public.tasks table has neither — INSERT fails with UndefinedColumn
Browser smoke test FAIL: smoke test registration fails because /api/auth/register returns 500, browser_smoke_test.overall = 'error'

tests.name: Browser CRUD: Projects
tests.detail: Browser agent completed full CRUD cycle: Login PASS, Visual Styling PASS, Projects CREATE PASS, Projects READ PASS, Projects UPDATE PASS, Projects DELETE PASS

tests.name: Browser CRUD: Login/Auth
tests.detail: User Login PASS, Auth Redirect PASS, User Logout PASS, Form Validation PASS. Account creation showed 409 duplicate-email from seed email reuse — expected server-side validation behavior, not a bug.

tests.name: Browser CRUD: Tasks
tests.detail: Login PASS, Dashboard Access PASS, Tasks Page Navigation PASS, Task Creation Form Access PASS. URL validation is intentionally strict (type=url input). Task CRUD fully verified via API (CREATE/LIST/GET/UPDATE/DELETE all pass).

notes.schema_fixes_verified: users.name + display_name present, projects.user_id correct (not owner_id), tasks has description/assignee_id/url/preview_url — all schema mismatches from iteration 1 are fixed
notes.console_errors_reviewed: favicon.ico 404 (non-critical), _rsc ERR_ABORTED (Next.js RSC prefetch on page navigation — normal), no pageerror or unhandled JS exceptions found
